description: This is a deprecated endpoint. This endpoint returns the change history for the specified BimModel. The change history is sorted by most recent first.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The extended view provides what is shown below.
The normal view is the same as the extended view but excludes attribute created_by.
The compact view returns ids only.
The default view is normal.

readable_column.description: Localized readable name of the column changed

formatted_column.description: Human readable name of the column changed

old_value.description: Value of the column before change

new_value.description: Value of the column after change
